description_long: This is a rectangular, two-tiered utility shelf or workbench with a sturdy frame and open sides. The top and lower shelf surfaces are made of a light-colored, wood-textured material with a distinctive swirling grain pattern, giving it a utilitarian yet natural appearance. The supporting frame is constructed from solid, dark brown beams, providing structural stability and a contrasting visual accent to the lighter wood surfaces. The open design allows for easy access from all sides, making it suitable for storage or workspace use in garages, workshops, or urban outdoor settings. There are no doors, drawers, or visible handles, emphasizing its simple, functional design. The shelf is freestanding and appears robust enough to support heavy objects placed on either tier.
description: A sturdy, two-tiered wooden utility shelf with a dark brown frame and light wood-grain surfaces, open on all sides for easy access.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the top and lower shelf surfaces, framed by dark brown beams and open sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the frame, with the wood grain pattern visible on the surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the open structure and both shelves clearly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the depth and open access, with the wood grain pattern on display.
